boundaries.description: Enforces safety boundaries: file access, scope limits, risk levels, emergency stop

escalation.description: Manages escalation events, integrates with ApprovalGates for human-in-the-loop

cycles.description: Phase-based improvement cycle orchestration with checkpoint/rollback support

integration.description: Integration tests verifying components work together

design_decisions.boundary_enforcement: Checks file access, scope (max files/lines), risk level, emergency stop
design_decisions.escalation_integration: Uses existing ApprovalGates for human-in-the-loop on boundary violations
design_decisions.rollback_support: Checkpoint at each phase boundary for resume capability
design_decisions.emergency_stop: Blocks all proposals immediately when activated
